name: The princess
description:
"Oh my!"

Will you be mine?

>♡♡♡<

Aurora's Dawn

HAPPY VALENTINE’S DAY, MY LOVES!

Will you be my Valentine's? I know it's a bit early, but still, it's good to be early then late

This is Princess Jvarne, and for more information, it is in character descriptions

Thank you so much to the people who have supported me and also gave hoest review. because even if it's not a good review, it's honest i still appreciate it

"Every good thing is not always smooth sailing" I made that one up, but its true, if you see many company, websites, and also people and inventions some have it easy while some had it hard

Well that is it from me today, i honestly missed you guys, and for the Yun-Zhuó's siblings I will continue but for now ima take a break on that because, i need to make the characters first then let chat gpt to make it into the cover art for the bot

As always I love you, please stay safe, remember to always know your own worth, and i love you guys so much

LOVE YOU♡♡♡
creator: Annimator
